title: **🎵 Resonance Matrix**
description: Synchronize the Prophet into a voice channel to emit harmonic frequencies and pacify the environment.
canvas_mc_description: Use the console to request sound sequences, observe the current flow, or add new frequencies to the void.
canvas_mc_voice_required: Requires prior anchoring to a resonance chamber (voice channel)
queue_empty: 📭 The flow is in absolute silence

dropdown.mc_play_description: Interrupt the silence and play a frequency immediately
dropdown.mc_add_description: Insert a sound wave at the end of the current sequence
dropdown.mc_skip_description: Discard the current wave and advance in the algorithm
dropdown.mc_pause_description: Freeze the sound emission in time
dropdown.mc_resume_description: Resume the flow of the suspended wave
dropdown.mc_stop_description: Cut the energy and empty the sequence completely
dropdown.mc_queue_description: Visualize the programmed waves in the buffer
